channel.title: Product Design on Travis Beckham
channel.description: Recent content in Product Design on Travis Beckham

item.description: Zenith has introduced the new Defy Lab watch, which they say is the most accurate mechanical watch ever made. It runs at a frequency five-times greater than a standard mechanical watch and has a 60-hour power reserve. I'm also loving the material it's made from, which is called aeronith. It's an ultra-light aluminum composite that looks a bit like concrete. The price? $31,000. See a video overview from aBlogtoWatch.
